title: vivo Launches an All-Day Powerhouse, the vivo V60 Lite 5G
description: BUSINESS NEWS - vivo proudly announces the...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - vivo proudly announces the launch of the V60 Lite 5G, an all-day powerhouse offering ultra-long battery life, sharp photography, and robust durability.


> It’s designed to keep up with modern lifestyles where performance, creativity, and endurance matter most.


Power That Lasts All Day

At the heart of the V60 Lite lies a powerful 6500 mAh BlueVolt battery, engineered to deliver heavy all-day use in an ultra-slim 7.59 mm design.

It is the thinnest phone in its price segment to feature such a large battery, offering the largest combination of capacity and charging speed without sacrificing size. Users can enjoy hours of entertainment, browsing, and gaming without the constant worry of charging. And when it’s time to recharge, the 90W FlashCharge powers the device from 1% to 100% in under an hour.

Gamers benefit from Bypass Charging, enabled in Ultra Game Mode, which directs power straight to the system instead of the battery. This reduces heat generation, keeps performance smooth and stable, and extends overall battery health. With vivo’s assurance of five years of reliable battery performance, the V60 Lite upholds its benchmark for battery endurance.

Sharp Photos Day or Night

Photography is another area where the V60 Lite delivers exceptional value. Equipped with a 50 MP Sony IMX882 AF main camera and vivo’s AI Master Aura Light Portrait system, which matches the Aura Light Colour Temperature to the specific scene type to capture luminous, sharp, and natural-looking portraits in any setting. The Aura Light also expands the lighting area and softens illumination for true-to-life skin tones and professional-grade results.

Powered by AI Imaging 3.0, the V60 Lite brings creativity to users’ fingertips with AI Erase 3.0 (including reflection removal), AI Photo Enhance, and vivo’s Self-Developed Super Night Algorithm for crystal-clear low-light shots. Both front and rear cameras support 4K video recording, enhanced with Film Camera mode for trendy retro filters, making the V60 Lite a versatile companion for content creation.

Built for Everyday Durability


> The V60 Lite is made to withstand the mishaps of everyday life and is backed by vivo’s 7-Star Quality Promise (when activated on or before 30 April 2026), which includes:


- MIL-STD-810H impact resistance (Military-Grade Damage Protection)
- SGS Drop Resistance Certification
- 5-Year Battery Health
- 50-Month Smooth Performance
- IP65 Dust and Water Resistance, which guards against splashes and dust
- Reinforced Protective TPU Case for reinforced protection
- 360° Accidental Protection, which covers one-time free repair of screen, back cover, camera glass cover, and frame within 365 days for activation, valued at R4000

This reflects vivo’s ethos of real-life durability which backs users with practical, meaningful features that add real value to their everyday lives.

“Smartphones have become central to our daily lives, and at vivo, we believe they should deliver real value where it matters most,” said Tony Shi, General Manager at vivo South Africa. “From its 6500 mAh BlueVolt battery and Sony IMX882 camera to our unique 7-Star Quality Promise, it’s built as an all-day powerhouse that performs reliably in real life, not just on paper.”

Entertainment and Seamless Performance

The MediaTek Dimensity 7360-Turbo chipset ensures smooth performance across entertainment, gaming, and multitasking. Paired with up to 16 GB RAM (8 GB + 8 GB Extended RAM) and 256 GB ROM.

Connectivity is seamless with AI SuperLink, combining 5G with a 360° omnidirectional antenna, Wi-Fi boosting, and smart network switching for stable connections wherever users go.

Sleek Design with Confident Style

The V60 Lite continues vivo’s design legacy with an Exquisite Transparent Camera Module, crafted with a minimalist vertical lens layout that reduces clutter while delivering a refined, premium feel. Its Ultra-Thin Flat Screen design, measuring just 7.59 mm, makes it stylish, ergonomic, and perfect for long hours of use.

The device comes in Elegant Black, a timeless premium finish, and the hero colour Titanium Blue, inspired by Arctic glaciers. Its metallic texture and shimmering purity reflect elegance, poise, and calm confidence.


> The vivo V60 Lite is more than just a smartphone, it is an all-day powerhouse.


With ultra-long battery life, professional Sony imaging, military-grade durability, and seamless performance, it empowers users to stay connected, creative, and confident from morning to night.

The vivo V60 Lite is now available at a RSP of R12 999 and comes with a free smartwatch, exclusively through Vodacom and Cell C stores and online.

www.vivo.com/za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
